Define security-relevant performance and assurance measures that enable the assessment of technical achievement and their relative criticality.
Provide feedback to applicable stakeholders from the analyzed requirements to validate that their protection needs and expectations have been adequately captured and expressed.
Resolve stakeholder requirements issues related to protection needs.
Obtain explicit agreement that the stakeholder requirements satisfactorily address protection needs.
activity_title: MANAGE THE STAKEHOLDER NEEDS AND REQUIREMENTS DEFINITION

description: Record asset protection data.
activity_title: MANAGE THE STAKEHOLDER NEEDS AND REQUIREMENTS DEFINITION

description: Maintain traceability between stakeholder protection needs and stakeholder requirements.
activity_title: MANAGE THE STAKEHOLDER NEEDS AND REQUIREMENTS DEFINITION

description: Provide the security-relevant artifacts that have been selected for baselines.

description: Identify the security aspects of an acquirer's need for a product or service.
Define the security aspects of the supply strategy.
Evaluate a request for a product or service to determine the security-relevant feasibility and how to respond.
activity_title: RESPOND TO A REQUEST FOR SUPPLY OF PRODUCTS OR SERVICES

description: Prepare a response that satisfies the security criteria in the solicitation.
activity_title: RESPOND TO A REQUEST FOR SUPPLY OF PRODUCTS OR SERVICES

description: Negotiate and approve an agreement with the acquirer that includes security acceptance criteria.
Identify necessary security-relevant changes to the agreement.
Evaluate the security impact of necessary changes to the agreement.
Update the security criteria in the agreement with the acquirer, as necessary.
Execute the security aspects of the agreement according to established project plans.
Assess the execution of the security aspects of the agreement.
Deliver the product or service in accordance with the agreement security criteria.
activity_title: DELIVER AND SUPPORT THE PRODUCT OR SERVICE

description: Provide security assistance to the acquirer, per the agreement.
activity_title: DELIVER AND SUPPORT THE PRODUCT OR SERVICE

description: Securely accept and acknowledge payment or other agreed consideration.
activity_title: DELIVER AND SUPPORT THE PRODUCT OR SERVICE

description: Transfer the product or service to the acquirer or other party as directed by the security requirements in the agreement.
activity_title: DELIVER AND SUPPORT THE PRODUCT OR SERVICE

description: Close the agreement in accordance with the agreement security criteria.

description: Define the security aspects of the intended behavior and outcomes at the functional boundary of the system.

Identify and define any security-relevant facility or site changes needed.
